creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
I am going to close this as "not able to reproduce" unless I create
a custom NVidia driver package on some other machine running 14.0
and then drag it over to a 13.0-p7 ( or p9 ) machine and try to run
pkg upgrade afterwards. All in all it was a nit and not a bug. You
can quote me on that.

--
Dennis Clarke
RISC-V/SPARC/PPC/ARM/CISC
UNIX and Linux spoken
GreyBeard and suspenders optional
